controlRule: Do not make a real activation, provider handoff, or scale decision from any single page. Use the Control Tower to review stage status, blockers, dependencies, evidence classes, owners, and decision route first.
safetyRule: This public v3.3 Control Tower is fake/sample only. It must not collect or expose real names, emails, access needs, incidents, official Toastmasters records, member numbers, payments, signatures, authority records, access logs, decision records, or private pilot evidence.
noGoTriggers: NG-001: Any real name, email, phone, address, access need, incident detail, payment, member number, signature, authority record, or official Toastmasters record in public files
NG-002: No named First Nations authority or quorum for activation decision
NG-003: Data classes, purpose, access, retention, deletion, or reporting not approved
NG-004: Notice, consent, withdrawal, correction, PIA, retention, or incident response is incomplete
NG-005: No approved workspace, access register, MFA, backup, export, delete, restore, or logs
NG-006: No-private-access roles, provider, supporter, or public reviewer can see private records
NG-007: Forms, member numbers, signatures, payments, or charter records enter public/pilot package
NG-008: No owner can pause intake, support participant, or run breach/cultural safety escalation
NG-009: Participant cannot withdraw or correct private record
NG-010: Provider gets real export before authority, contract, privacy, and access pass
NG-015: Second pilot, provider handoff, or broader rollout starts before closeout and authority record
NG-016: Go/hold/no-go record lacks conditions, expiry, owner, no-go triggers, or monitoring schedule
NG-017: No hour 0-72 checks or authority checkpoint after activation

sourceAnchors.label: Maiam nayri Wingara Indigenous Data Sovereignty
NHMRC Aboriginal and Torres Strait Islander research ethics

stageReadiness.evidence: index.html, docs-index.html, document.html, package manifest, release validation
stageReadiness.decisionRule: Use as public front door only
stageReadiness.readySignal: Current package version is v3.3 and live entrypoints pass

stageReadiness.decisionRule: First Nations organisations can be modelled safely with fake/sample data
stageReadiness.readySignal: Join/support tracks and data boundary are public-safe
stageReadiness.noGo: Organisation support role implies private authority

stageReadiness.decisionRule: Real records stay out until readiness gates pass privately
stageReadiness.readySignal: Readiness, role access, and data-transfer controls are mapped
stageReadiness.noGo: Real workflow starts from public sample

stageReadiness.decisionRule: Run-day controls, participant states, incidents, and official handoff are rehearsed
Private environment, schema, access, dry run, and decision record are prepared
stageReadiness.noGo: Public static demo becomes system of record

stageReadiness.decisionRule: Launch gates, intake states, communications, and learning metrics are defined
stageReadiness.readySignal: Launch learning and closeout trigger exist

stageReadiness.decisionRule: Closeout, deletion/retention, access review, evidence ledger, and scale decision are available
stageReadiness.readySignal: Closeout rules can govern any repeat or scale path
stageReadiness.noGo: Pilot repeats or scales without closeout

stageReadiness.decisionRule: Authority, IDS, privacy, role access, notice, environment, and scale criteria must pass privately
stageReadiness.readySignal: Public model is ready; real signoff remains private
stageReadiness.noGo: Developer custody substitutes for First Nations authority

stageReadiness.decisionRule: Approval meeting, signoff, tabletop, evidence, rehearsal, and monitoring must be run with fake data
stageReadiness.readySignal: Public rehearsal package is ready; private decision not recorded
stageReadiness.noGo: Activation starts without drill or monitoring

stageReadiness.evidence: Build Partner Desk, Build Delivery Control, fake package only
stageReadiness.decisionRule: Any provider sees fake/sample data until contract, authority, and privacy pass
stageReadiness.readySignal: Provider scope and fake handoff path are defined
stageReadiness.noGo: Provider receives production export too early

stageReadiness.evidence: Official forms, payments, signatures, member numbers, charter route outside demo
stageReadiness.decisionRule: Official records remain external to Governance Commons public package
stageReadiness.noGo: Member number, payment, or charter record enters public/pilot files

stageReadiness.evidence: Private authority record, signoff matrix, evidence packet, monitoring schedule
stageReadiness.decisionRule: Only after private signoff, drill, no-go testing, and 72-hour monitor plan
stageReadiness.readySignal: Public demo says hold until private evidence exists
stageReadiness.noGo: Real activation occurs from public page alone

dependencyMap.dependency: Onboarding data boundary must be accepted before private pilot scope
dependencyMap.noGo: Private pilot scope starts before organisation boundary is understood

dependencyMap.dependency: Readiness gates must exist before run-day operations are rehearsed
dependencyMap.noGo: Ops rehearsal assumes unapproved private fields

dependencyMap.dependency: Run-day support, incident, handoff, and deletion paths inform implementation controls
dependencyMap.noGo: Implementation omits run-day incident or support controls

dependencyMap.dependency: Private environment, schema, access, and dry run must shape launch gates
dependencyMap.noGo: Launch opens before environment and access are approved

dependencyMap.dependency: Launch metrics and first-30-day review must feed closeout decision
Any repeat, scale, or second pilot must use closeout evidence and authority route
Authority, IDS, privacy, access, notice, and environment approval must be rehearsed
Signoff, tabletop, evidence packet, rehearsal tasks, and monitoring must pass
Official records stay outside public and unapproved private pilot tools
dependencyMap.evidence: Toastmasters source anchors and handoff rules

dependencyMap.dependency: Provider receives fake/sample package until authority, contract, and privacy path pass
Each release excludes screenshots, server files, and private data; all manifest entrypoints return 200
Incident pause, breach assessment, notification route, and support owner must be rehearsed
Data classes, authority, benefit, reporting, retention, and deletion must be approved
dependencyMap.noGo: Data is reused because it is available

dependencyMap.dependency: Notice, consent, withdrawal, correction, access, retention, and deletion must be approved
dependencyMap.noGo: People submit info without clear notice

dependencyMap.dependency: Activation cannot continue without early checks and authority checkpoint
This v3.3 view becomes the single review route for blockers and next decisions

consolidatedNoGo.trigger: Any real name, email, phone, address, access need, incident detail, payment, member number, signature, authority record, or official Toastmasters record in public files
consolidatedNoGo.response: Stop release, remove file, audit, and record private incident

consolidatedNoGo.trigger: No named First Nations authority or quorum for activation decision
consolidatedNoGo.response: Hold activation until authority pathway is approved

consolidatedNoGo.trigger: Data classes, purpose, access, retention, deletion, or reporting not approved
consolidatedNoGo.response: Hold or no-go until IDS/data governance pass exists

consolidatedNoGo.trigger: Notice, consent, withdrawal, correction, PIA, retention, or incident response is incomplete
consolidatedNoGo.response: Hold intake until privacy decision is recorded

consolidatedNoGo.trigger: No approved workspace, access register, MFA, backup, export, delete, restore, or logs
consolidatedNoGo.response: Hold activation until environment drill passes

consolidatedNoGo.trigger: No-private-access roles, provider, supporter, or public reviewer can see private records
consolidatedNoGo.response: Revoke access, audit, and rerun role test

consolidatedNoGo.trigger: Forms, member numbers, signatures, payments, or charter records enter public/pilot package
consolidatedNoGo.response: Move to official route and pause pilot

consolidatedNoGo.trigger: No owner can pause intake, support participant, or run breach/cultural safety escalation
Participant cannot withdraw or correct private record
consolidatedNoGo.response: Hold intake until route is tested

consolidatedNoGo.risk: Provider receives real data too early
consolidatedNoGo.trigger: Provider gets real export before authority, contract, privacy, and access pass
consolidatedNoGo.response: Deny export and use fake/sample package only

consolidatedNoGo.trigger: Small sample or contextual wording can identify a founder, participant, support need, or incident
consolidatedNoGo.response: Rewrite as aggregate or hold public update

consolidatedNoGo.trigger: Team cannot prove recovery, export, deletion, or retention pathway
No response owner or response clock for support, withdrawal, correction, or access needs
Pilot has no review date, retention/deletion rule, or closeout owner
Second pilot, provider handoff, or broader rollout starts before closeout and authority record
consolidatedNoGo.response: No-go scale path until closeout and authority pass

consolidatedNoGo.trigger: Go/hold/no-go record lacks conditions, expiry, owner, no-go triggers, or monitoring schedule
consolidatedNoGo.response: Hold activation until decision record is complete

consolidatedNoGo.trigger: No hour 0-72 checks or authority checkpoint after activation
consolidatedNoGo.response: Hold activation or pause at hour 0

consolidatedNoGo.trigger: No single review of stage status, dependencies, blockers, owners, and evidence before decision
consolidatedNoGo.response: Run v3.3 control tower review first

evidenceStatus.evidence: Release validation, HTTP scan, screenshots, no console errors
Version, entrypoints, catalog paths, local links, release notes
v2.5 onboarding tracks and data boundary
Real readiness gate evidence belongs privately
evidenceStatus.publicRule: Do not claim real readiness publicly

evidenceStatus.evidence: Run-day and incident rehearsal evidence belongs privately
Access logs, backups, restore drill, admin roles, hosting decision
Quorum, delegation, decision, conditions, expiry, stop triggers
evidenceStatus.publicRule: Cannot substitute public status for authority

evidenceStatus.evidence: Data classes, purpose, benefit, retention, deletion, reporting
evidenceStatus.publicRule: Cannot collect real data without approval

evidenceStatus.evidence: Notice, consent, withdrawal, correction, incident response, retention
evidenceStatus.publicRule: Cannot open real intake without approval

evidenceStatus.evidence: Official forms, payments, member numbers, signatures, charter records
Incident facts, access logs, affected people, assessment, escalation
Contract, access limits, fake handoff, no production export
Hour 0-72 check results and authority checkpoint
Deletion, retention, archive, revocation, closeout review

ownerActions.detail: Confirm stage statuses, blockers, dependencies, signoff, and no-go triggers
Confirm First Nations authority, quorum, delegation, and escalation
Approve data classes, access, retention, deletion, reporting, and benefit
Approve notice, consent, withdrawal, correction, retention, and incident route
Run access, MFA, backup, export, delete, restore, log, and revoke checks
Confirm pause, support, escalation, breach assessment, and cultural safety pathway
Keep membership, chartering, signatures, payments, and member numbers external
Check screenshots, CSV, JSON, docs, and public wording
Set response clocks for support, withdrawal, correction, and access needs
Use fake/sample package until contract, authority, privacy, and access pass
Set review date, delete/retain/archive owner, and evidence rule

decisionRoutes.when: Public review can continue with fake/sample data only
decisionRoutes.nextAction: Share public links and collect non-sensitive feedback

decisionRoutes.when: Authority, IDS, privacy, or official boundary not approved
decisionRoutes.nextAction: Use v3.1 authority page and private approval record

decisionRoutes.when: Authority model exists but signoff/tabletop/evidence/monitoring not rehearsed
decisionRoutes.nextAction: Use v3.2 activation drill and private decision record

decisionRoutes.when: Technical proof is missing or stale
decisionRoutes.noGo: Static site becomes system of record

decisionRoutes.when: Provider help needed but no real data access approved
decisionRoutes.nextAction: Send v3.3 public package and fake/sample scope only

decisionRoutes.when: Any blocked no-go trigger is present
decisionRoutes.nextAction: Stop real intake, fix blocker, rerun control tower review

decisionRoutes.when: All blocked items closed but support/provider/advice/closeout conditions remain
decisionRoutes.nextAction: Record conditions, expiry, owners, and 72-hour monitor
decisionRoutes.noGo: Conditions have no owner or expiry

decisionRoutes.when: All required private evidence, signoffs, drill tasks, and monitoring checks pass
decisionRoutes.nextAction: Open limited private intake with 72-hour authority checkpoint
